events.text: Haissem Hassan (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half Extra Time ends, Australia 1, Egypt 1.
Substitution, Egypt. Hamza Abdelkarim replaces Omar Marmoush.
Substitution, Australia. Mathew Ryan replaces Patrick Beach.
Yasser Ibrahim (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Egypt. Mahmoud Saber replaces Marwan Attia.
Delay in match because of an injury Alessandro Circati (Australia).
Delay in match because of an injury Yasser Ibrahim (Egypt).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Second Half Extra Time ends, Australia 1, Egypt 1.
Substitution, Argentina. Leandro Paredes replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Tagliafico replaces Facundo Medina because of an injury.
Second Half ends, Argentina 1, Cabo Verde 1.
First Half Extra Time begins Argentina 1, Cabo Verde 1.

Goal! Argentina 2, Cabo Verde 1. Lisandro Martínez (Argentina) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Alexis Mac Allister with a headed pass following a corner.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Yannick Semedo replaces Deroy Duarte.
Substitution, Cabo Verde. Gilson Benchimol replaces Kevin Pina.
Goal! Argentina 2, Cabo Verde 2. Sidny Cabral (Cabo Verde) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Yannick Semedo.
Substitution, Argentina. Gonzalo Montiel replaces Nahuel Molina.
Own Goal by Diney Borges, Cabo Verde. Argentina 3, Cabo Verde 2.
Gonzalo Montiel (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Colombia. Juan Fernando Quintero replaces Jhon Arias.
Alidu Seidu (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Richard Ríos (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Ernest Nuamah replaces Jordan Ayew.
Substitution, Ghana. Prince Adu replaces Caleb Yirenkyi.
Substitution, Colombia. Jaminton Campaz replaces Luis Díaz.
Delay in match because of an injury Gideon Mensah (Ghana).
Delay in match because of an injury Richard Ríos (Colombia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Second Half ends, Colombia 1, Ghana 0.
Substitution, Canada. Promise David replaces Ali Ahmed.
Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Richie Laryea.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 2. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Brahim Díaz following a fast break.
Substitution, Morocco. Marwane Saadane replaces Issa Diop.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Azzedine Ounahi.
Substitution, Canada. Jonathan Osorio replaces Niko Sigur.
Substitution, Canada. Jayden Nelson replaces Tajon Buchanan.
Delay in match because of an injury Promise David (Canada).
Delay in match because of an injury Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 3. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Brahim Díaz following a fast break.
Goal! Paraguay 0, France 1. Kylian Mbappé (France) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Paraguay. Mauricio replaces Diego Gómez.
Substitution, Paraguay. Gabriel Ávalos replaces Miguel Almirón.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Manu Koné (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Ousmane Dembélé.
Michael Olise (France) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Paraguay 0, France 1.
